name: webnotes-builder
description: Converts a folder of course material (PDF slides, markdown, past exams, assignments) into a complete interactive HTML study site — one chapter page per source file, with per-section quizzes, annotated code, CSS diagrams, an exam-prep page (solved exam-style exercises, theory flash-cards, trace drills), and a cross-chapter test. Can also enhance an existing webnotes site to this standard. Includes content-fidelity guarantees so nothing from the source is silently dropped, and a chunked multi-session workflow with state persistence. Works for CS, math, algorithms, networking, databases, logic programming, and other technical subjects.
author: K24 student community
